title: Thursday briefing
subtitle: 4 meetings today · 2 worth extra prep
summary: Two external meetings need prep: one with Acme on procurement timing, one with Northstar where the last call ended with an open pricing question.

meetings.title: Acme kickoff follow-up
meetings.suggestedOpener: Good to reconnect — last time we ended on implementation timing, so I’d love to hear what changed since then.
openLoops: You promised to send the revised implementation timeline.
Alice said procurement would review the order form this week.
talkingPoints: Ask whether procurement has approved the updated order form.
Clarify the internal owner for rollout.
recentUpdates: Acme announced a new operations lead on LinkedIn.
Their company blog mentioned an expansion into EMEA.

meetings.title: Northstar pricing discussion
meetings.suggestedOpener: I wanted to circle back on the pricing thread from last week and see what landed internally.
openLoops: Northstar wanted a cleaner explanation of annual versus quarterly pricing.
You said you would send a side-by-side pricing summary.
talkingPoints: Check whether legal has any blockers.
Push toward a concrete next step.
